epistemic_boundary: Priority routes research. It is not a probability of harm, evidence of provider intent, or a finding of ontology capture.

priority_formula.P0: O>=2 and F>=2 and C>=2 and (X>=2 or P>=2) and E>=2
priority_formula.P1: same structural profile as P0 and E<2, or any load-bearing facet is unknown
priority_formula.P2: exactly two or three of O,F,X,C,P are >=2 and E>=2
priority_formula.tie_break: E desc, C desc, O desc, industry_id asc
priority_formula.unknown_rule: null is never zero and forces P1 or P3 until resolved

industries.name: Healthcare payer and provider operations
industries.observed_market_direction: Official sources describe connectors and agents entering coverage, records, coding, claims, and care workflows.
industries.does_not_prove: No source establishes covert capture, training, ownership, or cross-customer reuse of a healthcare ontology.

industries.name: Life sciences and pharmaceutical operations
industries.observed_market_direction: Official sources describe frontier systems spanning discovery, trials, regulatory workflows, and commercialization.
industries.does_not_prove: Market integration does not establish transfer or misuse of proprietary scientific judgment.

industries.name: Financial services and investment management
industries.observed_market_direction: Official product pages describe connected internal and market data, proprietary models, compliance, and investment workflows.
industries.does_not_prove: The sources do not establish any institution's executed controls or provider secondary use.

industries.name: Insurance underwriting and claims
industries.observed_market_direction: Official sources describe model integration into underwriting, claims intake, internal tools, and core-system modernization.
industries.does_not_prove: Connected claims and underwriting workflows do not establish ontology extraction or provider ownership.

industries.name: Manufacturing, semiconductor, and industrial engineering
industries.observed_market_direction: Official sources describe models reading schematics, running tests, comparing live equipment with digital twins, and entering factory systems.
industries.does_not_prove: These statements do not establish retention or reuse of proprietary engineering knowledge.

industries.name: Accounting, tax, audit, and corporate finance
industries.observed_market_direction: An official partnership describes agents across planning, reporting, procurement, treasury, tax, controls, and close.
industries.does_not_prove: A partnership announcement does not establish any client's deployment, data custody, or provider learning.

industries.name: Cybersecurity and managed incident response
industries.observed_market_direction: An official partnership describes an always-on security engineer subagent for managed security operations centers.
industries.does_not_prove: The announcement does not establish customer telemetry flows, retention, or model training.

industries.name: Energy and utilities
industries.observed_market_direction: An official product page names energy disaster-mitigation and operational use cases.
industries.does_not_prove: The source does not expose the workflow's feedback or custody architecture.

industries.name: Aviation and airline operations
industries.observed_market_direction: An official partnership names model integration into mission-critical airline systems.
industries.does_not_prove: The source does not identify a specific airline workflow, data path, or secondary use.

industries.name: Government and public administration
industries.observed_market_direction: An official partnership names government agencies among mission-critical deployment targets.
industries.does_not_prove: The source does not identify a particular agency, authority, or deployed workflow.

industries.name: Creative and design production
industries.observed_market_direction: An official product page describes connectors across creative tools, pipeline translation, scripts, iterative feedback, and handoff.
industries.does_not_prove: Tool integration does not establish ownership or cross-customer learning from creative assets or taste.
